description: Send notifications to your own SMTP2Go destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise smtp2go:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.
name: msg-to-smtp2go_email

request.template: {"urls":"smtp2go://${ customer_secrets.SMTP2GO_EMAIL_USER }@${ customer_secrets.SMTP2GO_EMAIL_HOST }/${ customer_secrets.SMTP2GO_EMAIL_APIKEY }/","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"smtp2go://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }/","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
